use_cases: Right-click context menus for desktop and mobile web applications
Nested submenu navigation for complex action hierarchies
Accessible menu systems with built-in keyboard navigation support
Custom-styled dropdown menus triggered by user interaction
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based context menu component with nested submenu support and comprehensive keyboard accessibility. Built with Tailwind CSS for minimalist styling, it provides a complete menu system including triggers, groups, radio groups, and portal rendering. The component follows shadcn/ui patterns with clean, accessible menu interactions suitable for any web application requiring right-click or custom menu functionality.
